name: Carrots and Grapes Vermouth
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 2 (10-oz.) packages of Green Giant Crinkle Cut Carrots in Butter Sauce.
2. Cook the carrots according to package directions.
3. Open the carrot pouch and drain the butter sauce into a medium saucepan.
4. Stir in brown sugar and vermouth.
5. In a small bowl, mix cornstarch and water until smooth.
6. Blend the cornstarch mixture into the butter sauce.
7. Heat over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is smooth and slightly thickened.
8. Add halved carrots and grapes to the sauce.
9. Continue heating for an additional 2 minutes.
TIP: To prepare ahead of time, cook the carrots as directed and add the grapes just before serving. Ensure the dish is heated thoroughly.
